subject: Golduck swimming at speed through open water, body stretched horizontal
description: Golduck is depicted in full aquatic motion, body stretched horizontally as it surges through water. The blue duck-like Pokemon with a flat bill, webbed limbs, and a red gem on its forehead is oriented left-to-right across the frame. Water splashes and light refractions surround the figure, with a sandy or rocky bottom visible below and a bright aquatic surface environment above. The palette is dominated by blues and aquas with white water-light highlights and warm sandy amber at the lower edge. The scene reads as underwater or at the water's surface, lit from above.
foreground: Golduck in lateral swimming pose, blue body, flat bill, webbed limbs, red gem on forehead
background: underwater environment with surface light, sandy bottom visible
emotion: purposeful, swift — body taut with forward momentum
